summary: Cantrill shares an internal Sun Microsystems animated series called 'Inside Jack' that humorously promotes Solaris 10. He compares it favorably to South Park's irreverent style and notes it features an animated appearance by Mike Shapiro, the third and typically behind-the-scenes member of the DTrace team.
key_points: Sun created an animated series called 'Inside Jack' to promote Solaris 10
The series has a South Park-like irreverent humor style
Mike Shapiro, the 'shadowy' third member of Team DTrace, makes a rare animated appearance
money_quotes: Finally, we have the South Park of operating systems: Inside Jack.
It even offers a rare glimpse (albeit animated) at Mike, the shadowy and elusive third member of Team DTrace.
key_insight: Sun Microsystems used irreverent, South Park-style animation as an unconventional marketing approach for Solaris 10, reflecting the playful culture within the engineering teams.
